title: GameTrackDaily // Game Lineup
summary: The public-safe lineup for the current studio slate, covering browser demos, desktop builds, and the strongest public-facing proof slices.

games.title: Mandate 2029
games.summary: A governing sim about momentum, compromise, cabinet pressure, media storms, and the brutal arithmetic of staying electable while trying to change a country.
highlights: Polling pressure and election pacing
Reactive crisis deck and political capital tradeoffs
Regional swingboard and legacy-score framing

games.title: Civicrise
games.summary: A living isometric city builder about shaping dense urban systems, balancing civic needs, and watching a place emerge block by block into a believable metropolis.
games.publicStatus: Ready for screenshots and web-demo iteration
highlights: Readable isometric city drama
Citizen services, transport, and layered planning
Onboarding and help flows built for repeat sessions

games.title: Swarmbreaker
games.summary: Fast, vivid arcade defence with segmented swarms, poisoned mushrooms, wave pressure, and late-night score-chasing tension.
highlights: Classic arcade loop with modern quality-of-life polish
Wave scaling, audio controls, and extra-life thresholds
Purpose-built for immediate, readable action

games.title: Neon District
games.summary: An environment-first district slice with walkable space, layered buildings, and optional combat activation.
highlights: Dense cyberpunk district layout
Traversal and optional combat pressure
Mission-shaped demo track in progress

games.title: Starfall Protocol
games.summary: An orbital dock environment demo focused on mood, navigation, and hotspot-based world reads before the deeper production path.
highlights: Orbital dock mood and navigation
Third-person world read and traversal framing
Mission authorship track still in progress

games.title: Turbo Vector
games.summary: A marina-circuit racer growing from a single proof track into a championship loop with garage decisions, money, and upgrades.
highlights: Clean top-down handling and track readability
Garage and progression structure in active development
Mini-season demo route now part of the core track

games.title: Redline Horizon
games.summary: An Azure Coast road slice chasing the speed, scenery, and holiday-road fantasy of classic arcade racers.
highlights: Strong horizon-speed fantasy
Curated scenic run identity
Checkpoint and payoff structure now under active polish
